title: Transactional Product Resolution Workflows
scope: Implement write-capable resolution actions with impact previews, server-side JWT auth, pg-client transactions, revision checks, audit/history, usage-resolution cascade updates, and UI wiring.

auth.mechanism: JWT Bearer token verified with JWT_SECRET (server-side only)
auth.fallback: X-Access-Code for local development (refused in production unless ALLOW_ACCESS_CODE_IN_PROD is set)
auth.frontend_trust: none — frontend-supplied role/permissions/userId fields are completely ignored

transactions.pattern: BEGIN / COMMIT / ROLLBACK in withTransaction() helper

audit_trail.product_merge_history: Written for detach, reassign, make-independent, merge, unmerge with rollback_data JSONB for unmerge restoration
audit_trail.action_ids: Stable nanoid per action, stored in product_merge_history.action_id for undo lookup

usage_resolution_cascade.detach: affected usage rows marked reprocessing_required=true, previous_canonical_product_id preserved
usage_resolution_cascade.merge: all usage rows from merged product moved to surviving product + reprocessing_required=true

ui_changes.ProductDatabasePage: ExpandedSourcesView alert() placeholders replaced with ActionModal component supporting full preview→reason→submit→success/conflict/error flow
ui_changes.ActionModal: New shared component for all resolution actions with multi-phase UI state machine

test_coverage.integration_test_status: Skipped without TEST_DATABASE_URL (safety guard); pass when TEST_DATABASE_URL is set to a non-production database
test_safety_guards: Refuses to run if TEST_DATABASE_URL is missing
Refuses to run if TEST_DATABASE_URL equals NEON_DATABASE_URL (production check)
All test data isolated by timestamp prefix and cleaned up in afterAll

validation_gates.integration_tests: SKIPPED (no TEST_DATABASE_URL in CI) — gate marked blocked pending dedicated test DB provisioning
validation_gates.typescript_lint_new_files: PASS — 0 errors in ActionModal.tsx, resolutionActions.ts, canonicalProductDbClient.ts
